Name: 0_and_roblox_to_was
Representative_Docs:
['I love playing Roblox. I’m a girl, duh, and I dress like one on Roblox, too. It’s disgusting how many times I’ll be minding my own business in a game and people will come up and start harassing me, simply for my avatar. It gets to the point to where they don’t even phase me anymore, that’s how horrible it is. And that’s just the tip of the iceberg. You tell them to stop or leave you alone but it’s like they just get some dopamine boost from you being annoyed. They don’t even know what age you are. What if the person they were doing that to was 10? 12? 18? They don’t know. I know they might do it as a ‘joke’ but how far can a joke go before it’s just harassment? It’s even worse when you’re with friends, OR FAMILY. Like my god it is not hard to control your impulses. It has gotten so bad that I make my avatar ‘ugly’ (but still somewhat feminine) so I don’t get harassed simply for just existing. It’s not just female avatars it can happen to, it happens to anyone. Still, no matter who, it’s disgusting and suggestive behavior that should just not be promoted as a joke. Makes you wonder what those types of people do behind the scenes. Idc if they’re just ‘trolls’, are they all really just ‘trolls’?

You guys are absolute legends for putting a stop to this disgusting madness, despite how much of a mental toll it must take on you. Even if you don’t catch all the predators, you definitely discourage this behavior. Thank you.
(Also it’s lowk crazy seeing how good you are at making these predators comfortable with you all to make them drop even more info)', "2:30
now that im seeing other ppl show their stories i think I wanna share mine too, thankfully this was all roblox and he was never able to get to the point of asking to meet me


he said he was 17 i lied and said i was 13

9 year old me, obsessed with rp games like scp site rp's and specifically ER:LC ( all on roblox early 2020 or so ). very popular game basically a cops and robbers civilian or whatever you want to call it rp city game like many others. I remember meeting a guy, i dont remember how we got to the point we did but i remember he had this thing for pr3gancy roleplays and honestly at that time i barely even knew what that was, i still believed that the stork delivered u to ur parents front door step. so here i was, he rented this house in the game and he rp's yknow what in disgusting detail for what roblox allowed and even pretended to take me to the hospital and what not and get a friend to act as the baby. this is all so embarrasing to type out but honestly ever since it happend ive had no one to tell this to and especially since i didnt have a clue how to report ppl, more that he never got punished for his actions. the worst part is he friended me and got me to believe all the stuff he was doing was normal and right, and i believed him
only until he started doing it an absurd amount did little me decide it was time to unfriend and block him. i know i didnt know any better at that time but honestly i forever hated myself for not blocking him earlier on bc he honestly ruined me as a child and i never got to have that back ever again purely bc of him. im jst thankful this never escalated to real life and jst thinking that theres other ppl that get their childhood exploited in game or in real life jst geniunly makes my blood boil 
     crazy to think how 1 person u met online can be the reason a 9 yr old never thinks like a 9 yr old again 🙃", "A while ago I was playing with a friend of mine in a game called pop it trading and some guy walked up to me and said ( I want to a jark it to your Avatar) and the context is I was wearing a blue outfit it was like pajamas and I had blue hair and glasses and he just walked up behind me and started talking like that and then I was like (I'm 9) and he said (oh well that doesn't really change anything) and that's not even the worst encounter I've had on Roblox not to mention I've been sa'd in real life by my own grandfather and he was trying to groom me from the moment I turned 5 to when I was 10 so I'm really happy with the things you're doing to get people like my grandfather sent to prison for the disgusting things they've done to children"]
